name: Pizza Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the pinto beans in water overnight.
2. In a slow cooker, cook the beans in water on high for 2-3 hours until tender but not mushy.
3. Drain the beans, saving the liquid.
4. Add tomatoes, onion, green bell pepper, garlic, salt, oregano, and rosemary to the slow cooker.
5. Add 2 cups of the saved bean liquid.
6. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
7. Stir in the shredded mozzarella and grated Romano cheeses, then cover and cook on high for 15-20 minutes.
8. Turn off the heat and let stand a few minutes before serving to allow the beans to absorb some of the juice.
